data.body:
[LIVIN’ ON SWEETS! Update Notice]

Sensei, the mini-game LIVIN’ ON SWEETS! has been updated.

Through the newly added rhythm training, try playing soundtracks from Serenade Promenade in style~!
➡️ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2817348
